textByHash.1c865fd76fcfe8fa36298fc22bf6eb94f1852e40: I am a holy Knight of the Unicorn. I served under the Archpriest of this place who himself served under the Justiciar of the Unicorn.
textByHash.20bd283fa05584590d36afa3b1366cf545594691: It's not like I have any use for my stuff anymore. Thanks adventurer, your words do lighten my spirits somewhat.
textByHash.3e316f348315a11694109ef97f2b4832602f5e02: The statue in the north east of this room was created in his likeness when the place was built. I must say though, it does concern me that this is the first you've heard of him and his feats.
textByHash.471c13ca28f70abdfaacabbb4754723722c0c1de: Anyway, do tell me adventurer, what brings you to the Hallowed Sepulchre?
textByHash.726f8559f47127d3dd161c62ac1351cfca4e85a0: The title of knight perhaps has a different meaning to you adventurer. In fact, all of the knights of my order are priests who serve under Saradomin.
textByHash.7a4c9ea287315c073d3c7a327dc9d0050aee2837: Hmm, interesting. I wish I could see for myself but unfortunately, I am unable to leave this place. I do wonder if this new 'management' is the reason my spirit did not pass on to the afterlife.
textByHash.8644d605458bca339de16d782ab3aea4c2824297: The Justiciar of the Unicorn? Why this title is only bestowed upon the holiest priest of Saradomin.
textByHash.8b191f924aba3fb0e140f20eba0a56f9a1fa0868: That saddens me greatly. I do hope that he is still carrying out Saradomin's will.
textByHash.a5db6a71e44ac4dbd2f88bb93547443b7fc71db4: I see. Did you say Darkmeyer? An interesting name, especially when this region is so bright and full of life.
textByHash.a7b365935cd291030aa38829b025008e9ccf5710: During my life, I spent my time here consecrating the fallen followers of holy Saradomin. I would perform their final rites before laying them to rest within this place.
textByHash.b53c25e5cb8aa047f9e0c245c235fd0decf11f2a: When I was alive this place was known as Hallowvale. Do you know why the queen decided to change the name?
textByHash.c8aab4cd8911597c4eb34a1d3b27e66a6d006505: You dare defile this sacred place? That treasure doesn't belong to you!
textByHash.d7c5ccc2c7ff809588818742e40879f97e7b0d45: The justiciar I followed would spread the teachings of Saradomin everywhere he went, converting the masses to our religion.
textByHash.f4aad5200d4700a7e832b2916e93137b8081451e: I admit, I never dared ask who or what we were protecting it from.
textByHash.f4d0ffc466d8c2691ad62ecc3f63949568a803d4: Not at all. We also provided these rites for all the citizens of Hallowvale. They were mostly laid to rest on the first two floors.
textByHash.f604261ced988244305f2d0d8b151e12e9ced3b4: I fear you may be right adventurer. The last instruction I was given was to help protect this place from invaders by placing magical enchantments on the statues within.
